# isCancelled

**Instance Property**

Returns a Boolean indicating whether the given dispatch source has been canceled.

## Declaration

```swift
var isCancelled: Bool { get }
```

## Canceling a Dispatch Source

- **cancel()**: Asynchronously cancels the dispatch source, preventing any further invocation of its event handler block.
- **setCancelHandler(handler:)**: Sets the cancellation handler block for the dispatch source.
- **setCancelHandler(qos:flags:handler:)**: Sets the cancellation handler block for the dispatch source with the specified quality-of-service class and work item options.
